home.description: Full-stack web developer and educator based in Vietnam. I craft elegant digital experiences with Next.js, Golang & Devops and offer tutoring.
home.findOutAboutMe: Find out who I am and what I'm good at

seo.title: eo optimization
seo.body: Driving organic traffic and improving search engine rankings through strategic keyword research, on-page and off-page optimization, and technical SEO best practices.

frontend.title: rontend coding
frontend.body: Building responsive and interactive user interfaces with modern web technologies like HTML, CSS, and React or Nextjs to deliver engaging user experiences.

backend.title: ackend coding
backend.body: Developing robust and scalable server-side applications, managing databases, and designing APIs to ensure seamless data flow and functionality.

teaching.title: nglish teaching
teaching.body: Facilitating effective language acquisition through engaging lesson planning, diverse teaching methodologies, and fostering a supportive learning environment.

problemSolving.title: Problem-solving mindset
problemSolving.description: Challenges are addressed through strategic thinking and creative solutions, leveraging research and experience to meet complex requirements effectively.

fastService.title: Fast Service
fastService.description: My passion lies in crafting high-quality web solutions. I'm a lifelong learner, constantly honing my skills to bring you the most current and effective technologies.

secureSolutions.title: Secure solutions
secureSolutions.description: Built with stability and data protection in mind, using industry-standard security protocols and robust testing procedures.

transparent.title: Transparent and clear
transparent.description: Maintains consistent updates and transparent collaboration to ensure all stakeholders remain aligned throughout the development process.

blog.pageDescription: Explore articles about web development, programming, and the latest technology trends. Tips, tutorials, and insights from a full-stack developer.
blog.enjoyedDescription: I write about web development, React, Next.js, and more. Let's work together on your next project.
blog.authorBio: Full-Stack Web Developer & Educator based in Vietnam. Passionate about Next.js, React, and building great web experiences.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Fill in the form below to get in touch with me. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Let's get you back on track.
